entities.name: U.S. NATIONAL PLANT GERMPLASM SYSTEM (NPGS)
entities.description: A system dedicated to collecting, documenting, preserving, evaluating, enhancing, and distributing plant genetic resources for economic crops.

entities.name: PLANT GENETIC RESOURCES
entities.description: Genetic materials of plants preserved for continued improvement in quality and production of economic crops.

entities.name: ECONOMIC CROPS
entities.description: Crops of significant economic value to U.S. and world agriculture.

entities.name: U.S.
entities.description: The United States of America.

entities.name: NATIONAL SEED STORAGE LABORATORY (NSSL)
entities.description: A facility where the base collection of the NPGS is preserved.

entities.name: U.S. DEPARTMENT OF AGRICULTURE
entities.description: The government department overseeing the NSSL.

entities.name: FORT COLLINS, COLORADO
entities.description: The location of the National Seed Storage Laboratory.

entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A crop species collected and preserved by NPGS and ICRISAT.

entities.name: PEARL MILLET
entities.description: A crop species collected and preserved by NPGS and ICRISAT.

entities.name: CONVENTIONAL STORAGE
entities.description: A storage method used for sorghum and pearl millet accessions, typically at -18°C.

entities.name: CRYOSTORAGE
entities.description: A storage method using vapor phase above liquid nitrogen at about -160°C.

entities.name: VAPOR PHASE ABOVE LIQUID NITROGEN
entities.description: The specific environment used in cryostorage.

entities.name: INTERNATIONAL CROPS RESEARCH INSTITUTE FOR THE SEMI-ARID TROPICS (ICRISAT)
entities.description: An organization that assembles and preserves collections of sorghum and pearl millet.

entities.name: PATANCHERU
entities.description: The specific location of ICRISAT.

entities.name: HYDERABAD
entities.description: The city near which ICRISAT is located.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: The country where ICRISAT is located.

entities.name: ALUMINUM CANS
entities.description: Containers used for maintaining and preserving accessions in medium-term storage.

entities.name: MEDIUM-TERM STORAGE FACILITY
entities.description: A facility maintaining accessions at about 4°C and 20% relative humidity.

entities.name: LONG-TERM STORAGE
entities.description: A storage method at -20°C for rejuvenated accessions.

entities.name: VACUUM SEALED MOISTURE PROOF ALUMINUM FOIL PACKETS
entities.description: Packaging used for accessions in long-term storage.
